body:
Quick follow-up — will have the communion supplies confirmed by Thursday morning.

— Ashley
subject: Re: Sunday Bulletin — Greater Hope Baptist — October 19

body:
Rhonda,

Just a note to remind myself to confirm with Brother Dawson about Friday morning. I will call him this evening to make sure he is still available and has the loading dock address.

— Ashley
subject: Friday Volunteer Reminder

body:
Denise,

I meant to ask at Sunday dinner — do you have Malik's track schedule for November? I would like to get a couple of his meets on my calendar if I can. Your mother would like to come to at least one.

Dad
subject: Malik's Track Schedule

body:
Pastor Gaines,

Brief update on the anniversary book inventory. I did a recount yesterday afternoon and we are at 86 copies — two more arrived in Tuesday's delivery. I have them set aside in the storage room.

In His service,
Ashley Rogers
subject: Anniversary Book Count Update

body:
Terri,

Just checking in on you. It has been a few weeks since we talked properly. Your mother asks about you every few days. How are you holding up?

Dad
subject: Checking In

body:
Marcus,

Just confirming — you and Keisha are still coming Sunday? Your mother is planning the menu around a full table. Let me know if something came up.

Dad
subject: Sunday Dinner This Week

body:
Pastor Gaines,

I have been going over the December 12th setup timeline. I believe we need the setup crew there by 7:00 AM given the extra chairs for the anniversary service. I can coordinate with Brothers Dewayne and Patterson if you would like me to handle the crew assignment.

In His service,
Ashley Rogers
subject: December 12 Setup Crew

body:
Rhonda,

The donor receipt batch from last week has been processed and sent through Mailgun. Twenty-two receipts total. I held three back because the addresses were unclear — I will bring those in Friday so you can verify them in person.

Ashley Rogers
subject: Donor Receipt Batch

body:
James,

I wanted to ask you about the basement. We have had a slow drip under the utility sink for about two weeks now. It is not urgent but I want to get ahead of it before winter. Do you know whether that is something a plumber needs to look at or could it be the fitting? You mentioned before that you had dealt with something similar.

Ashley
subject: Basement Repair Question

body:
Denise,

Aaliyah mentioned at Sunday dinner that she had a school project on Michigan history. I did not catch all the details. Is there anything she needs help with? I spent thirty-one years driving routes all over this city — I may know a thing or two worth putting in a report.

Dad
subject: Aaliyah's School Project

body:
Keisha,

I want to get Zoe something she will actually use for Christmas. Do you have any idea what she is interested in these days? I am not always up on what seven-year-olds enjoy. Your mother has her own ideas but I would like to get her something from me separately.

Ashley
subject: Christmas Gift for Zoe

body:
Pastor Gaines,

I have an update on the sick list for October. Brother Earl Watkins is home from the hospital and receiving visitors. Sister Loretta Brown's daughter asked that we hold off on home visits until next week. I will arrange a deacon visit to both households by the 25th.

In His service,
Ashley Rogers
subject: Sick List Update

body:
Rhonda,

I will be in Monday morning to do a pallet count before the week's distribution. Wanted to let you know in case you need me to pull anything from the back as well.

Ashley Rogers
subject: Pallet Count Monday

body:
Marcus,

When you get a chance, can you give me a call about the Binance account? I received an email I did not recognize and I want to make sure everything is in order before I do anything. I did not click on anything. Just call when you have a few minutes.

Dad
subject: Binance Question

body:
Terri,

Your mother and I have been talking about Christmas. We would like everyone here if possible — all three families. I know Ann Arbor is a drive but it would mean a great deal to her to have the grandchildren in the house on Christmas morning. Let me know what you and Greg are thinking when you have a chance.

Dad
subject: Christmas Plans
